name: Dragonmaid Changeover
name_jp: ドラゴンメイドのお<ruby lang="jp"><rb>召</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>め</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>し<ruby lang="jp"><rb>替</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>か</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>え
desc: Fusion Summon 1 Dragon Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field as material. While this card is in your GY: You can target 1 "Dragonmaid" monster you control; add this card to your hand, and if you do, return that monster to the hand. You can only use this effect of "Dragonmaid Changeover" once per turn.
eff: Fusion Summon 1 Dragon Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field as material. While this card is in your GY: You can target 1 "Dragonmaid" monster you control; add this card to your hand, and if you do, return that monster to the hand. You can only use this effect of "Dragonmaid Changeover" once per turn.

action: Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
Sends from your field to your Graveyard
Uses cards in the hand as Fusion Materials
Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Returns itself from Graveyard to hand
Returns from your field to your hand
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
